'''Tanlassa''' was one of the continents located in the southern hemisphere of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]].<ref name="Battle Surgeons" /> It saw intense fighting during the early years of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], as large quantities of [[Bota/Legends|Bota]] grew there.
